title: soderstromia
intro: Soderstromia is a genus of flowering plants in the family Malpighiaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stems, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Soderstromia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Traditionally, Soderstromia is prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties, and it is also used in some traditional medicine practices as a poultice or paste to treat wounds and skin irritations.
